case_title: TATUM, LINDA VS HAIRSTON, PEARL AKA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TATUM, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT HAIRSTON, PEARL AKA OOOOOOOOOOOOO AKA AKA TURNER, PEARL AKA AKA HAIRSTON, PEARL TURNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATUM, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIRSTON, PEARL AKA AKA TURNER, PEARL AKA AKA HAIRSTON, PEARL TURNER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,526.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF'S DECL:LEGAL ADVISOR SAID SHE CAN SEND BY CERT.MAIL OUTSIDE OF CALIF.IN A REAL PROPERTY CASE.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO PEARL HAIRSTON RETURNED SIGNED;
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
